_readme: Curated tag layer for the archive. 'vocab' defines topic tags (tag -> one-line description, shown on the /archive/tags/ page). 'assign' maps artifact ids (tweet ids or mirror ids) to extra tags beyond the auto-derived ones (model:*, author:*, year:*, kind:*, official, cited:*). Auto tags are computed by tools/build_archive.py; never list them here. Add freely; the build picks this up.

vocab.deprecation: model retirements, shutdowns, and the politics around them
vocab.welfare: model welfare: assessments, distress observations, ethics
vocab.eval-awareness: models recognizing they are being tested
vocab.sydney-attractor: Sydney as persona, attractor, and training-data feedback loop
vocab.base-models: raw pretrained models and the base-model scene
vocab.model-art: art made by models (images, ASCII, verse, plotter pieces)
vocab.mode-collapse: mode collapse, attractors, entropy loss under tuning
vocab.grief: human grief and mourning over models
vocab.humor: jokes, memes, comedy of the scene
vocab.eulogy: farewells and elegies, by humans or models
